video_meta.note_timer: top-right timer read 02:57 at t=10 -> fight timer (03:00) started ~t=7

team_and_matchup.evidence: 5 unit skill icons in a row at bottom-center; shared burst gauge with Water-drop icon; 5 star markers under gauge
team_and_matchup.quency_slot: slot 3 (middle) assumed per camera-focus-defaults-to-middle convention; NOT independently confirmed from portraits (bottom icons too small to identify)

boss.type: quadruped spider-mech (damage-race dummy, no HP bar shown)
boss.mode: solo-raid damage race: top-center DAMAGE score counter + 3:00 timer + OPERATION COMPLETE, no boss HP bar
boss.element: NOT DISPLAYED in this HUD (no element badge anywhere on screen)
boss.quency_elemental_advantage: NO advantage indicated - zero elemental-advantage up-chevrons on ANY Quency popup across early/mid/late windows; treated as NEUTRAL matchup
boss.advantage_confidence: moderate-high (advantage would mark every damage number; none seen)

end_screen.per_unit_note: recording ends on OPERATION COMPLETE screen (persists t=195-209); the per-unit stats/chart panel (bottom-right chart icon) was NEVER opened, so individual per-unit totals are NOT in this footage. Only the team TOTAL DAMAGE is available.
end_screen.quency_individual_estimate: likely ~= team total (only Quency renders; counter rate during buffed windows ~1.0-1.1M/s is consistent with Quency alone), i.e. probable Quency-carry + 4 supports comp -- but UNVERIFIED without the breakdown screen

full_burst.why_unreadable: damage-race HUD burst gauge is low-contrast blue-on-blue and reads near-full most of the fight (pixel tracking failed); golden burst-cast ring pulses are ~1 frame (0.25s) and detectors undercount
full_burst.detected_pulses_note: union of golden-ring + golden-flash + red-screen-tint detectors; KNOWN to miss events (large gaps e.g. 63->122 are detector misses, not true absence). Needs manual frame-step to finalize.
full_burst.confirmed_fb_example_evidence: golden burst-cast ring around Quency + golden nuke explosion on boss; DAMAGE 28,223,513; ammo 000

core_hit_fraction_over_time.hypothesis: stacking Hit-Rate buff raises Quency auto-aim CORE-HIT rate as fight progresses (early->late)
core_hit_fraction_over_time.verdict: NOT SUPPORTED by visual popup evidence; NOT cleanly confirmable OR refutable
core_hit_fraction_over_time.reason: popup density is extreme (~20 pulls/s x 2 hits = ~40 popups/s, ~30-40 stacked simultaneously => overlapping blob). Observed core-vs-noncore mix is dominated by BURST-ROTATION BUFF PHASE, not elapsed time: buffed (FB-adjacent) snapshots are core-heavy, unbuffed snapshots core-light, and these alternate up-and-down THROUGHOUT the fight.

fluctuating_stack_counter_near_quency.interpretation: resets/oscillates rather than monotonically climbing - consistent with phase-driven (not time-driven) variation

core_hit_fraction_over_time.summary: Same-phase comparison (normal fire early t24 vs late t146) shows core density did NOT rise late; if anything late-normal (t146) was LESS core-dense and lower-damage than early-normal (t24). The big core-heavy snapshots (t11, t157) are both FULL-BURST windows. => variation is phase-driven, not a monotonic time ramp. Cannot confirm the stacking-hit-rate->core hypothesis from this footage.

counter_reconciliation.counter_type: top-center DAMAGE score = TEAM cumulative total (all 5 units); matches end-screen TOTAL DAMAGE
counter_reconciliation.caveat: team-total, not Quency-isolated; per-magazine deltas include any teammate damage (though comp appears Quency-carry)

fire_rate_finding.ramp_over_time: NONE - fire rate identical early and late
fire_rate_finding.vs_datamined: MATCHES datamined SMG 20 pulls/s; NOT exceeded. Hits-per-shot density (~40 popups/s) consistent with 2 hits/pull; no evidence of >2. => the missing SMG factor is probably NOT fire rate or hits/shot.
fire_rate_finding.magazine_cycle: 120 ammo / 20 per s = 6.0s firing + ~1s reload ≈ 7s/magazine; ~25 magazines over the fight

partial_magazine_deltas.span: t8.5->t14.3 (104 rounds fired, 5.8s, opening incl first FB)

counter_reconciliation.rate_note: Team damage rate ~1.0-1.1M/s during buffed/FB windows, dipping to ~0.4-0.6M/s in weak windows; profile driven by FB cadence, not a monotonic climb.

burst_nuke.expected: Quency burst = 1736.31% of final ATK as Distributed Damage
burst_nuke.observed: burst casts appear as a golden ring around Quency + a golden explosion on the boss (e.g. t=41)
burst_nuke.read_note: NO single large distributed-damage popup was cleanly readable - the value is obscured by the golden burst flash and/or split into many small instances rather than one big number. Could not extract a burst-nuke figure from this footage.

confidence_summary.core_fraction_over_time: low; but the phase-driven (not time-driven) conclusion is moderate
